affected_locations.label: entrypoint/wrapper
affected_locations.detail: Service-role coach cron reads all subscriptions after cron secret/feature flag.

evidence: Traced authenticated RLS source to service-role coach-push scheduled read and outbound send sink. Did not run dynamic SSRF reproduction in this discovery-only worker.
proof_gap: Need validation of coach_push feature flag/runtime reachability, signal preconditions, web-push endpoint restrictions, redirects, private/metadata IP handling, and Supabase Edge network reachability.

source_or_privileged_boundary: Authenticated Data API write to public.web_push_subscriptions.endpoint; scheduled coach-push service-role function reads it later.
closest_control: RLS owner_all limits row ownership but does not validate endpoint destination; cron secret and feature flag gate execution but not stored endpoint safety.
impact_path: Attacker-controlled stored endpoint may cause coach-push Edge Function to issue outbound requests to attacker-chosen destinations when feature/signal preconditions are met.
counterevidence: coach_push migration seeds flag disabled; normal UI uses browser PushManager; cron secret prevents direct function triggering; web-push library may reject malformed/non-HTTPS endpoints.
counterevidence_disposition: Feature flag is a runtime precondition, not a destination control. Candidate remains distinct for later validation when the feature is enabled.
